message:
fix: remove hardcoded limits from findGateReadyMolecules queries (bd-kzp3)

The three internal queries (closed gates, ready work, hooked issues) used
hardcoded Limit values (100, 500, 100) that silently truncated results.
Since these queries feed set-intersection logic, truncation produces
incorrect output. Limit: 0 (the default) means no limit in the storage layer.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
